Matching
2 ?07 1011000100 4

Constant
2 C 2 1111111111 a mismatch
2 C 2n 0000000000 a mismatch

Unary 0
2 I 0 0110111000 5 mismatch
2 I 0n 1001000111 5 mismatch

Unary 7
2 I 7 1101111100 7 mismatch
2 I 7n 0010000011 3 mismatch

Binary 07
2 AND 07 0100111000 4 mismatch
2 AND 07n 1011000111 6 mismatch
2 OR 07 1111111100 8 mismatch
2 OR 07n 0000000011 2 mismatch
2 XOR 07 1011000100 4 match 1/1
all match XOR 07
2 XOR 07n 0100111011 6 mismatch
2 AND-NOT 07 0010000000 1 mismatch
2 AND-NOT 07n 1101111111 9 mismatch
2 OR-NOT 07 0110111011 7 mismatch
2 OR-NOT 07n 1001000100 3 mismatch

0 I 5

Extending defaults
2 1011000100 4
Starting at I 6 increasing
I 7 1101111100 partial 1001000111 5
left 5
Starting at I 1 decreasing
I 0 0110111000 partial 0010000011 3
right 3
Choosing left
2 I 7

Selected
0 I 5
1 I 6
2 XOR 07
3 I 1
4 I 2
5 I 3
6 I 4
7 I 5

Applying to 01100011
Input
I 0 = 0
I 1 = 1
I 2 = 1
I 3 = 0
I 4 = 0
I 5 = 0
I 6 = 1
I 7 = 1
Output
0 I 5 = 0
1 I 6 = 1
2 XOR 07 = XOR(I 0,I 7) = XOR(0,1) = 1
3 I 1 = 1
4 I 2 = 1
5 I 3 = 0
6 I 4 = 0
7 I 5 = 0

\boxed{01111000}
